title: Geo Tracker - GPS tracker
text: For recording a track, only a GPS signal is needed. One of the simplest yet well-designed GPS tracking and waypoint apps for Android – intuitive and reliable. I use this app for tracking and sharing trails we use for our fun ride and to host other horse rides. Works great offline – download the map ahead of time and you've got a really good GPS app. Spent a long time looking for a simple no-fuss app that can record a GPS path then export to file. Android’s battery optimizations can interrupt **Geo Tracker**’s background recording by pausing GPS updates to save power. Use automation apps like **MacroDroid** or **Tasker** to make **Geo Tracker** start or stop recording automatically—for example, when you arrive at a specific location.

title: TinyTask - Download Now!
text: TinyTask is the original **Windows macro recorder**, built by Vista Software. Designed as a free macro recording utility, TinyTask simplifies repetitive tasks by recording your keyboard inputs, mouse clicks, and cursor movements, then accurately replaying those actions whenever required. Key features of TinyTask include its intuitive interface, minimal system resource usage, and extremely compact file size, distinguishing it from other bulkier macro recorders available. Click **Stop** or use the shortcut again to finish recording. TinyTask will repeat every action as recorded. **General stability tips:** keep a consistent display DPI, disable auto-hide taskbar, avoid moving windows mid-playback, and record with natural pauses where apps load or files save. * If required, run TinyTask with elevated rights and re-record.
